word: H7025 - קִיר חֶרֶשׂ - Qîyr Cheres - keer kheh'-res - Kir-haraseth

sections.paragraph:
Original: קיר חרשׂת קיר חרשׂ

Transliteration: qı̂yr chereś qı̂yr chăreśeth

Phonetic: keer kheh'-res

BDB Definition:

Kir-hareseth or Kir-hares or Kir-haresh = "wall of potsherds"
  1. one of the two chief strongholds of Moab

Origin: from H7023 and H2789

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
